description: The Dollar-And-Cents Case Against Hollywood's Exclusion of Women
skip_reason: The treatment variable (clean_test categories: nowomen, notalk, men, dubious, ok) is the direct determinant of the binary outcome (PASS/FAIL) — they are the same measurement at different granularities. There is no independent treatment/exposure group that could be stratified to reveal Simpson's Paradox. The remaining candidate variables (decade_code, period_code) overlap and offer no meaningful third axis for a treatment×stratum×outcome structure.
